name: Bud's Italian Style Chicken & Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can diced tomatoes with green peppers and onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the tomato soup, diced tomatoes with green peppers and onion, garlic, celery, oregano, sweet basil, bay leaf, and red wine to a crockpot.
2. Place the chicken breasts in the crockpot.
3. Cook on low for 5 hours.
4. About 1 hour before the cooking time is complete, remove the chicken from the crockpot and set aside.
5. Add the rice and 1 cup of water to the crockpot.
6. Return the chicken to the crockpot and cook on high heat for an additional hour.
7. Serve hot, portioned out for 4 people.
Tried & tested.
